feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Post debit to specific G/L account upon goods receipt
entry.content:
Hi experts,
In the PO pricing procedure I'm using a condition type (ZCOS) to record a surcharge cost. As this cost might or not occur, the condition type is set as "Manual", "Condition Category" is empty and it does not have an "Access Sequence".
The surcharge cost must be posted in a specific G/L cost account (712001).

Imagine the following scenario:
- PO where we are buying 10 units of material XPTO ( PBSG 10 EUR);
- Surcharge cost (ZCOS) of 5 EUR it's added to the PO

My goal is to have the following postings when doing the goods receipt of the PO:
DEBIT - Inventory: 100 EUR
CREDIT - GR/IR: 105 EUR
DEBIT - Surcharge account 712001: 5 EUR

As you can see, I expect the surcharge cost to be credited in GR/IR and debited in our G/L account 712001.

Unfortunatelly, until now I was not able to get it and I tried different configurations like:

# Configuration 1 #
Condition Type ZCOS | Cond.Class: A, Calc.Type: B, Cond.Categ.: "", Accruals checkbox not ticked
Pricing Procedure | ZCOS with "Statistical" not ticked, having an "Account Key" that in OBYC points to 712001, "Accrual Key" empty

# Result of Config.1 #
DEBIT - Inventory: 100 EUR
CREDIT - GR/IR: 105 EUR
DEBIT - Purch.Price Variance: 5 EUR

As you can see the debit of the surcharge cost went to Price Variance account instead of our account 712001

# Configuration 2 #
Same as configuration 1 with only one difference, Condition Type ZCOS with Cond.Category "B" (delivery costs)

# Result of Config.2 #
Exactly the same as Config.1

# Configuration 3 #
Condition Type ZCOS | Cond.Class: A, Calc.Type: B, Cond.Categ.: "", Accruals ticked
Pricing Procedure | ZCOS with "Statistical" not ticked, having an "Accrual Key" that in OBYC points to 712001

# Result of Config.3 #
DEBIT - Inventory: 100 EUR
CREDIT - GR/IR: 100 EUR
DEBIT - Purch.Price Variance: 5 EUR
CREDIT - Surcharge 712001: 5 EUR

With this I now have 712001 being posted but as a CREDIT and I want a DEBIT. Also GR/IR is not being impacted.
We need to see something like this:
DEBIT - Inventory: 100 EUR
CREDIT - GR/IR: 105 EUR
DEBIT - Surcharge account 712001: 5 EUR

Can you help me on this?
Thanks

entry.title: Install S4HANA 2023 - Instance S4H/D10 reached state STOP after having state STARTING. Giving up.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I has issue when installed S4HANA 2023 and HANA Database in one host.

Kindly please your advice.

Detail issue on below, and please find the attachment.

An error occurred while processing option SAP S/4HANA Server 2023 > SAP HANA Database > Installation > Application Server ABAP > Standard System > Standard System (Last error reported by the step: Instance S4H/D10 reached state STOP after having state STARTING. Giving up). You can now:

Choose Retry
to repeat the current step.
Choose Log Files
to get more information about the error.
Stop the option and continue later.

Log files are written to /tmp/sapinst_instdir/S4HANA2023/CORE/HDB/INSTALL/STD/ABAP.

R3trans -d
This is R3trans version 6.27 (release 793 - 12.06.24 - 09:07:06).
unicode enabled version
R3trans finished (0000).

entry.title: RRI jump option for the CDS Analytics Queries
entry.content:
Hi , 

we are in S/4HANA (BW 7.56) and using CDS based queries.

I 'm trying to implement a RRI between 2 queries but not able to do achieve it so far.

I have implemented all RRI relevant snotes in the system.

And defined the RRI for a CDS based query on RSBBS transaction.  

and mapped the fields between 2 reports. 

But after RRI setting I'm not able to see jump option on RSRT. I have also tried same in AFO and SAC, also not able to see it there. 

Do you know if I miss anything. Or is it not possible to set up an RRI  between 2 CDS queries ? 

Thanks 

Erkan

entry.title: SAP MDG: How to make enable custom entity grey items in - Create Customer Search (HANA) ?
entry.content:
Hi 

Facing issue in choosing field grey check while create search view for Customer Search (HANA)

 

Thank You, 
Sowmya Surekha.

entry.title: Custom List entity using REUSE mode in sap MDG-S?
entry.content:
We have requirement to add Custom list entity using Reuse mode in MDG-S. we have the data mode extensions, genil Extensions and SMT mapping and brought Custom ENTITY in MDG UI. 

 

Issue is : - when we entered the data inside the custom entity UIBB. once Change request is Activated then data which we entered in the UIBB is getting Vanished and not getting updated in the Custom database table.

 

Kindly Help with Solution and Links.

 

Thanks in Advance

best Answer will be Rewarded.

entry.title: Single dunning letter for multiple company codes at same dunning level
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Requirement is to print all open items on single dunning notice from multiple company codes which has same level of dunning level.

Given i have maintained all the required cross-company code configuration, still system is printing separate dunning letters for each company code at same dunning level. If anyone can suggest, will be great help. 

Thank you.

entry.title: DRC configuration - create Tax Group - how to add Tax Rate field as a parameter?
entry.content:
Version: SAP S/4 HANA On-Premise

Question: DRC configuration question - how to enhance the configuration table of Tax Group to add Tax Rate column? What other impact does it have by adding Tax Rate into this definition of Tax Group?

Tax Rate is required to differentiate the Tax Groups (and subsequently map to different Tax Boxes). 

e.g. DE VAT Return 

Tax Code DA - 19% => mapped to Tax Group 81 (Tax Box 81)

Tax Code DA - 16% => mapped to Tax Group 35 (Tax Box 35)

The background is that tax code remains the same one DA for the VAT rate change from 19% to 16% using a third party time-dependent tax code solution (not SAP TDT solution as it is not available yet in On-Premise).

entry.title: Quota / Incorrect planning figures
entry.content:
Hello guys,

I have a quota of 80/20 in favor of the supplier 1225337.
However the planning only carried out by the supplier 132250.

Regards

entry.title: HANA Public Cloud in Substitution ( Precondition field / Function how we can add Assets table )
entry.content:
Hello ,

We need to create a custom substitution in HANA Public cloud ( App Mange Substitution & Validation ) and business requested to create below logic for  substitution.

Precondition ( Field / Function ) 

ANLB-BUKRS = '1234 AND ( ANLB-AFABE = '09' OR
ANLB-AFABE = '90' OR ANLB-AFABE = '91' ) AND
SYST-TCODE = 'AS01'

Substitution 

Scrap value   Constant = 30 ( Value )

Pls let us know how we can achieve above substitution in HANA Public cloud.

Thank 

JP

entry.title: 'Manage Customer Line Items' application
entry.content:
I want to retrieve the contents of the 'Manage Customer Line Items' application.
Which API should I use and which feature should I add in the Communication Arrangements?

entry.title: 'Manage Business Partner' application
entry.content:
I want to retrieve the contents of the 'Manage Business Partner' application.
Which API should I use and which feature should I add in the Communication Arrangements?

entry.title: SACF scenarios were automatically set to productive with Active check after using SWPM
entry.content:
The SAP S/4HANA Production application servers were migrated (Hardware migration). The SAP standard Software provisioning tool (SWPM) was used to perform this migration using the System copy option. There was no change at the Database side.

After this migration, we found that SWPM has by default set the SACF scenarios to Productive and Active. SWPM logs confirm that the Functional module SACF_SET_SBD was run due to which the scenarios were activated.

Before migration, these scenarios were not active at all. But post migration, with the scenarios active, users are facing issues while accessing various apps.

For some reason, we didn't have this issue in our lower environments, but are facing this in Production.

What would be the best approach to fix these issues in production, since we don't have the SACF productive scenarios active in lower environments? 

Would disabling the SACF productive scenarios help to get the Production back to normal?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to migrate roles and auth from old ECC system to S/4 Hana green field implementation
entry.content:
Hello All,

 

We have master and derived roles concept in our old ecc system. We need to migrate the roles and auth to new S/4 HANA greenfiled implemnetation. There are lots of master and derived roles in the ECC systems which we require to migrate in new S/4 Hana system. How can we migrate roles and auth from old ECC system to S/4 Hana with greenfield approach

Regards,

Saurav

entry.title: GB bank file for free to upload in BAUP
entry.content:
Hi,

Do you know a way to get the GB bank file to upload in SAP using T_code BAUP? The indications in SAP note 132012 refer to a Company, but you have to make a fairly expensive subscription and the file contains banks for countries I don't need. Does anyone know how to get this kind of file otherwise ? Many Thanks,

Isabel

entry.title: Enable to enable OAuth for Odata service created in SAP system
entry.content:
Hello SAP Folks,

I have exposed an S4HANA table as Odata service in SAP system. The Odata service works perfectly fine when tested with CRUD operations in SAP gateway client as  well as Browser. Also tested the same in Postman it works fine.

screenshot for reference

@

My question is : now I want to consume this into an Non SAP Application using oAuth client where i need  to pass below details  how can i enable / generate this details  for the Odata service that i have  created.

Can someone pls help here.

Thanks in advance

Regards,

Mellinda

@BobShen 

@SAPCommunity 

@odata 

 

OData

entry.title: S/4HANA Purchase Requisition: Delivery Address Reference by Default
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm on an S/4HANA system S4CORE 108 SP1 (so 2023 latest).

❓On tile "F2229 - Manage Purchase Requisitions - Pro" : I need to set a default delivery address by reference when I add an item ❓

The BADI "ME_PROCESS_REQ_CUST" is used by the tile, I can adapt the ITEMS logic using the PROCESS_ITEM method, but it's impossible to define a default address in the tile by this way.
Or maybe I missed something ...

I also tried via enhancement spot "MM_PUR_S4_PR" but I can't see how to adapt the delivery address with this enhancement spot.

Another enhancement spot "MM_PUR_S4_SSPPR" have a BADI "MM_PUR_S4_SSPPR_DEF_DEL_ADDRES" but it's not used by the tile "F2229". It is used by the tile "F1639A - My Purchase Requesition New" and this new tile can't work with address type "Reference".

No Address Type "Reference" for tile "F1639A" :

Do you have any ideas on how to do this ?

Thanks,
Youri

entry.title: Duplicate Purchase Requisitions
entry.content:
There is a issue. The material has MRP type VB, Reorder point 1, Lot-sizing procedure HB and Maximum stock level 1.

I have run MRP run today and a purchase requisition created with qty 1 with fixed id.

The purchase requisition has been approved and converted into purchase order with qty 1.

The next day after MRP run, there is one more purchase requisition created with qty 1 and md04 available stock showing 2 with both items, which is exceeding maximum stock level.\

Where is the issue?

entry.title: Barcode Scan button in Fiori App
entry.content:
I would like to create new fiori app which include Scan button to scan barcode.

Could you please kindly help me to fulfil this request. Is there any references?

Best Regards,

KhaingZin

entry.title: Unplanned depreciation for special depreciation
entry.content:
We are having a business scenario where we use special depreciation and ordinary depreciation in one depreciation key. Special depreciation is used to post initial allowance and ordinary depreciation is used to post annual depreciation.

To do adjustment to ordinary depreciation we use unplanned depreciation.

Is there a way where we can post adjustment to system calculated special depreciation  something like an unplanned special depreciation??

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
